text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We have Mia the black cat, Emma the<n>bear cub,
Nicole the squirrel, and Lola<n>the elephant...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, what do you think would be a good<n>name?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
"For what?" My new stuffed animal's<n>name, that's
what! It has to sound like a<n>bunny name, be cute,
and easy to say. ♪<n>Got it?
